description.zh: 皮影戏舞台后藏着 3D 积木：固定光源从幕布正前方投影，圆柱正着看是圆、侧着看是长方形！挑选并转动积木，观察不同立体图形的影子剪影。
description.en: Behind the shadow-play stage hide 3D blocks: a fixed front light projects each solid onto the curtain, so a cylinder can appear as a circle head-on or a rectangle from the side. Pick and rotate blocks to explore each silhouette.
